overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Elden Ring depicting a misty mountain vista with a massive floating temple structure, transitioning into a poisonous yellow-fog swamp filled with gnarled ancient trees. The camera moves smoothly from an aerial cliff overlook down into the toxic wetland environment, wading through shallow water beneath twisted branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with floating temple

agents.ego_description: hovering near cliff edge observing the distant floating structure

entered.detail: steep gray rock face with sparse pine trees
massive floating island with ancient architecture suspended in misty clouds
hazy mountain peaks fading into the clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty mountain vista with a massive floating temple structure visible in the distance. The camera hovers near a rocky cliff edge, slowly panning across the fog-filled valley and distant mountain ranges under diffused natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: poisonous fog swamp with gnarled ancient trees

events.description: enters the poisonous fog swamp from the mountain vista through a dark transition
location text 'Cave Poisonous Fog' and 'Crimson Great Wood' appears on screen
flying creatures appear circling in the yellow fog overhead

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through shallow swamp water beneath twisted ancient trees

notable_agents.action: flying creatures circling in the fog above the swamp trees

entered.detail: massive twisted tree trunk with exposed roots rising from the water
shallow murky water reflecting the yellow poisonous fog
ancient stone bridge or archway partially collapsed into the swamp
enormous ancient tree with sprawling branches dominating the center of the swamp
large dead tree trunks lying partially submerged in the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dense poisonous swamp filled with yellow fog and gnarled ancient trees. The camera moves forward through shallow water, passing massive twisted tree trunks and stone ruins. Location text appears identifying the area as 'Crimson Great Wood'. Around the 50-second mark, flying creatures begin circling overhead in the misty canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a serene, misty mountain vista into a toxic, fog-shrouded swamp. It begins by hovering near a rocky cliff edge, panning across a valley of diffused light where a massive floating temple looms in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the airy mountain atmosphere shifts into a dense poisonous swamp characterized by thick yellow fog and gnarled ancient trees. The scene then glides through shallow water past massive twisted trunks and stone ruins, with the location identified as Crimson Great Wood. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the misty canopy as flying creatures begin to circle overhead.
